overview.short: Bhat () is a village in Daskroi Taluka in Ahmedabad district of Gujarat State, India.
overview.description: Bhat () is a village in Daskroi Taluka in Ahmedabad district of Gujarat State, India. Bhat is located near the bank of the Sabarmati River, 24 km towards west from District headquarters Ahmedabad, 5 km from Daskroi and 49 km from State capital Gandhinagar.

topPlaces.name: Badarkha
topPlaces.description: Badarkha is a village located in Ahmedabad district, in the state of Gujarat, India, which has a population of more than 10,000. It is situated on the Ahmedabad–Dholka Highway, 12 kilometres (7.5 mi) from Dholka and 29 kilometres (18 mi) from Ahmedabad.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (28 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Lakkadiya Hanuman Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Badarkha, Visalpur, Chaloda, Chandisar, Dholka.
